hypothesis: Continual pre-training of the Granite LLM using a SMILES- and MOFid-aware tokenizer combined with a contrastive alignment loss between SMILES embeddings from PubChem and MOFid text embeddings will allow scaling PubChem to 2M compounds without degrading performance and produce at least a 10% reduction in QMOF test-set MAE compared to the PMC+PubChem(500K)-pretrained model.
